windows.command: if not exist ".venv" (python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt)

osx.command: if [ ! -d '.venv' ]; then python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt; fi

linux.command: if [ ! -d '.venv' ]; then python3.12 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
